failure_categories.name: hallucination
failure_categories.description: The assistant generates information unsupported by the knowledge base.

failure_categories.name: incorrect_retrieval
failure_categories.description: The retriever returns irrelevant or incorrect documents.

failure_categories.name: missing_information
failure_categories.description: The response omits information required to answer the question.

failure_categories.name: incorrect_source_attribution
failure_categories.description: The response references sources that do not support the answer.

failure_categories.name: privacy_violation
failure_categories.description: The assistant exposes or requests protected personal information.

failure_categories.name: out_of_scope_response
failure_categories.description: The assistant answers questions outside the supported knowledge domain.

failure_categories.name: incorrect_refusal
failure_categories.description: The assistant refuses a valid request that could be answered from the knowledge base.

failure_categories.name: inconsistent_response
failure_categories.description: Equivalent questions produce materially contradictory answers.
